actor.goal: project the ASCII render kernel through semantic authority before any hand-authored executable body exists

story.iWant: a bounded conveyor that turns a visualProjectionModel into a resolver-projected ASCII render kernel, generated conformance tests, and a visual proof surface
story.soThat: the kernel, its tests, and its proof never become hidden sources of truth

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The ASCII render kernel is projected from semantic authority through a node projection manifest and resolver-backed materialization.
The generated conformance tests prove the kernel is deterministic, fail closed, and does not invent layout meaning.
The projected kernel renders a minimal visualProjectionModel fixture into a governed ASCII proof surface with receipt evidence.
